channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot Vulnerability Enables Data Theft
item.description: A new vulnerability in Microsoft 365 Copilot allows attackers to steal sensitive data via a crafted URL. This poses significant risks for enterprise users.

item.title: Record Sale for Pristine Super Mario Bros. Cartridge
item.description: A pristine copy of Super Mario Bros. has sold for millions, breaking sales records due to its rarity and condition. Collectors are eager for such finds.

item.title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Revives Airship Gameplay
item.description: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation reintroduces the iconic Highwind airship, allowing players to pilot it once again. Fans are excited for this nostalgic feature.

item.title: Nintendo Direct Breaks Viewership Records
item.description: Nintendo's latest Direct was the most-watched showcase of 2026, peaking at 3.7 million viewers. The Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake trailer led the views.

item.title: New Crossword Puzzle Released by Defector
item.description: Defector's latest crossword puzzle, crafted by Patrick Maher, is now available. It promises to challenge and entertain puzzle enthusiasts.

item.title: Apple and Tesla Collaborate on CarPlay Integration
item.description: Apple and Tesla are reportedly enhancing CarPlay support for Tesla vehicles. This collaboration could improve user experience in electric cars.

item.title: Google Chrome Update Ends Popular Ad Blockers
item.description: Google Chrome's upcoming update will eliminate many popular ad blockers due to changes in extension policies. Users may face increased ads.

item.title: Discount on Popular Qi2 Power Bank for Readers
item.description: The Baseus AM52 Qi2.2 power bank is now available at a discounted price of $42.99 for Verge readers. It's compatible with MagSafe devices.

item.title: EA Launches New Advertising Platform
item.description: Electronic Arts has introduced EA Advertising, allowing brands to advertise directly within gameplay. This innovation aims to enhance brand engagement.

item.title: Nintendo Deletes Hidden Info on Zelda Remake
item.description: Nintendo has removed hidden information about the Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake from its site, leaving fans speculating about the game.

item.title: Uncertainty Surrounds Trump Mobile's T1 Phone
item.description: A year after its announcement, the Trump Mobile T1 Phone's production status remains unclear, leaving potential buyers in doubt.

item.title: Craig Duncan Steps Down as Xbox Game Studios Head
item.description: Craig Duncan has resigned from his position as head of Xbox Game Studios after 18 months. His departure raises questions about future leadership.

item.title: SN Operator Review: Backup Solution for SNES Games
item.description: The Epilogue SN Operator is a device for backing up SNES games and saves, offering collectors a reliable preservation method. It's priced at $60.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Rumored Camera Upgrades
item.description: Rumors suggest the iPhone 18 Pro will feature significant camera upgrades, enhancing photography capabilities. Three main features are anticipated.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Casing Similar to Predecessor
item.description: The iPhone 18 Pro is expected to use the same aluminum alloy casing as its predecessor, maintaining a mix of pros and cons from previous models.
